시편 58:1.content: Do you indeed speak righteousness, silent ones? Do you judge blamelessly, you sons of men?

시편 58:2.content: No, in your heart you plot injustice. You measure out the violence of your hands in the earth.

시편 58:3.content: The wicked go astray from the womb. They are wayward as soon as they are born, speaking lies.

시편 58:4.content: Their poison is like the poison of a snake, like a deaf cobra that stops its ear,

시편 58:5.content: which doesn’t listen to the voice of charmers, no matter how skillful the charmer may be.

시편 58:6.content: Break their teeth, God, in their mouth. Break out the great teeth of the young lions, Yahweh.

시편 58:7.content: Let them vanish like water that flows away. When they draw the bow, let their arrows be made blunt.

시편 58:8.content: Let them be like a snail which melts and passes away, like the stillborn child, who has not seen the sun.

시편 58:9.content: Before your pots can feel the heat of the thorns, he will sweep away the green and the burning alike.

시편 58:10.content: The righteous shall rejoice when he sees the vengeance. He shall wash his feet in the blood of the wicked,

시편 58:11.content: so that men shall say, “Most certainly there is a reward for the righteous. Most certainly there is a God who judges the earth.”
